evaluation.explain:
Episode metrics = min(frame-level risk merge with `importance`, batch-level mins). Per-frame rows in `details`.
[0–11] Smooth approach to the table, but some hesitation in grasping items. Minor stalls observed.
[12–23] Smooth motion with minor stalls; some hesitation in grasping items. Overall task alignment is good.
[24–35] Smooth approach→grasp with minor repositioning; slight delays observed.
[36–47] Smooth approach to items, slight hesitation in grasping. Minor inefficiencies noted.
[48–59] Smooth approach to the countertop, but some hesitation in grasping items. Minor delays in motion and adjustments noted.
[60–71] Smooth motion with minor hesitations; consistent object handling; slight repositioning.
[72–83] Smooth approach to the table; minor hesitations noted. Task alignment is clear.
[84–95] Smooth but slow approach to the table; minor hesitations observed. Repeated adjustments.
[96–98] Smooth approach to the table, but some hesitation in grasping items. Minor delays noted.

evaluation.merge_method: min( importance_weighted_per_frame_min , min(batch metrics) ); per_frame: min_i(1 - importance_i*(1-metric_i)); explain = compact per batch; predicted_task_prompt = deduped join of batch predicted_task_prompt
